code: export const getToken=()=>localStorage.getItem("token")||"";export const getStoredUser=()=>{const raw=localStorage.getItem("user");if(!raw)return null;try{return JSON.parse(raw);}catch(_unused){return null;}};export const saveAuth=_ref=>{let{token,user}=_ref;localStorage.setItem("token",token);localStorage.setItem("user",JSON.stringify(user));};export const clearAuth=()=>{localStorage.removeItem("token");localStorage.removeItem("user");};export const isAuthenticated=()=>Boolean(getToken()&&getStoredUser());
